info.name: flydubai UAT - Offer & Order Management
info.description: Postman collection generated from flydubai developer portal. Scope: Offer Management and Order Management only. Run Authenticate first, then the endpoint requests. Example bodies come from the portal and may need live fare IDs / PNR values from the previous step in the booking flow.

exec: } catch (e) { console.warn('Could not parse JWT payload', e); }
pm.test('Response is not HTML error page', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.text().trim().startsWith('<')).to.equal(false); });

request.description: Generated from flydubai developer portal example.

response.name: Documentation example response
